methods.description: Configuration and implementation of the NCAR Community Climate System Model version 3 for simulating climate components including atmosphere, ocean, land, and sea ice.

steps.description: The National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR) Community Climate System Model version 3 is composed of four components representing atmosphere, ocean, land (including the DGVM), and sea ice connected by a flux coupler.
steps.searchable_summary: Configure NCAR Community Climate System Model version 3 with four components: atmosphere, ocean, land, and sea ice.
inputs: NCAR Community Climate System Model version 3

steps.description: Use the low-resolution version of the model, in which the resolution of the atmosphere and land components is given by T31 (3.75 • transform grid), while the ocean has a nominal horizontal resolution of 3 •.
steps.searchable_summary: Set model resolution to low-resolution version with T31 for atmosphere and land, and 3 degrees for ocean.

steps.description: The atmospheric and oceanic grids have 26 and 25 levels in the vertical, respectively.
steps.searchable_summary: Configure vertical levels for atmospheric and oceanic grids to 26 and 25, respectively.

steps.description: New parameterizations for canopy interception and soil evaporation have been implemented into the land component in order to improve the simulation of the land hydrology and vegetation cover.
steps.searchable_summary: Implement new parameterizations for canopy interception and soil evaporation in land component.

steps.description: CCSM3's dynamic-vegetation model DGVM is based on the Lund-Potsdam-Jena (LPJ) model and simulates the spatiotemporal distribution of 10 plant functional types (PFTs; 7 tree PFTs and 3 grass PFTs) which are differentiated by physiological, morphological, phenological, bioclimatic, and fire-response attributes.
steps.searchable_summary: Simulate spatiotemporal distribution of 10 plant functional types using DGVM based on LPJ model.

steps.description: The land and atmosphere components are integrated with a 30 min time step, while vegetation structure and PFT population densities are updated annually.
steps.searchable_summary: Integrate land and atmosphere components with 30 min time step; update vegetation structure and PFT densities annually.
